explanation: Inserted quotes around the file path to test if the Sigma rule accounts for quoted arguments. This mimics a common mutation technique while preserving the original command behavior.
Substituted '/s' with '-s' to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to short option syntax variations.
Added an optional '/nologo' flag to test if the Sigma rule is affected by additional benign command-line arguments.
Omitted the '/s' flag to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to the presence of optional flags.
Appended an extra '/' to test if the Sigma rule is affected by trailing or malformed arguments.
